Dental Careers in Ottawa
Looking for a rewarding career in a modern Ottawa dental practice?
We invite you to join our growing team.
About Our Ottawa Practice

Dentistry On Catherine Street (DOCS) is a premier multidisciplinary dental specialty practice located in downtown Ottawa, Ontario. We are proud to deliver expert oral maxillofacial surgery, periodontal treatments, endodontic services, and dental implant therapy to the National Capital Region. Our dedicated team provides patients with exceptional dental care through compassion, technical excellence, and the use of advanced clinical technology. While we were previously known as GumDocs, our new brand, DOCS, continues to uphold the highest standards of specialized dental service in Ottawa.

Our success is built on a foundation of teamwork and professional excellence. We believe that every employee plays a vital role in our office culture and patient outcomes. We are committed to the personal and professional development of our staff, fostering an environment where every team member works toward the same goal: providing Ottawa’s best dental experience.
